sections.heading: Definition
sections.body:
The `$currentDate` expression returns the system time of your
stream processing workspace each time Atlas Stream Processing evaluates it. This ensures that time
fields you add from within a streaming data pipeline remain up-to-date
for each processed message.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.body:
The `$currentDate` expression is an empty object `{}` and has no
internal syntax.

sections.heading: Behavior
sections.body:
Pass `$currentDate: {}` as the value of any expression which accepts
an [ISODate](manual/reference/glossary) value.

sections.heading: Examples
